source.description: Page the image came from — original author/source attribution

image.description: Primary image: a bare filename, or an object carrying source/credit attribution (preferred for new images)

images.description: Array of images: bare filenames, or objects carrying source/credit attribution (preferred for new images)

price.description: Bare numbers/strings are USD. Non-USD prices use {amount, currency}; display keeps the original currency, while sorting compares semi-recent USD equivalents (app/lib/currency.ts).

currency.description: ISO 4217 code (EUR, GBP, …); omit for USD

voltage.description: Bare number = volts; or a strict unit string ('5V', '3.3 V', '~5V') or range ('3-7.5V'). Parsed by app/lib/quantity.ts.

current.description: Bare number = amps; or a strict unit string ('22mA', '500uA', '~5mA'). Parsed by app/lib/quantity.ts.

frequency.description: Bare number = hertz; or a strict unit string ('800kHz', '30MHz', '286Hz'). Parsed by app/lib/quantity.ts.

power.description: Bare number = watts; or a strict unit string ('110mW', '5W'). Parsed by app/lib/quantity.ts.

datasheet_sources.description: Alternate hosts for the datasheet beyond datasheet.url, categorized by who hosts it. Manufacturer links are canonical but rot when sites restructure; distributor copies (LCSC, Pololu, Adafruit) are often more stable but may lag revisions — note the revision when known.

datasheet_mirror.description: Repo-managed copy of the datasheet PDF on Cloudflare R2. Written by CI (scripts/mirror-datasheets.ts) - do not edit by hand. The original author/source URL stays in datasheet.url.

url.description: Public R2 URL of the mirrored PDF

source.description: datasheet.url at fetch time; a changed source triggers re-mirroring

dead_links.description: URLs elsewhere in this entry that no longer work. Detail pages keep the original for attribution but link to `archive` instead — or to the newest Wayback Machine capture when `archive` is omitted. Set `archive` explicitly when the domain changed hands and the latest capture shows the wrong site.

url.description: The dead URL, exactly as it appears elsewhere in this entry

archive.description: Curated archived copy (e.g. a Wayback capture from before the domain changed hands)

checked.description: When the link was last confirmed dead

related.description: Related products (replacement, predecessor, variant, accessory, etc.). For a discontinued product, a `replacement` item points at its successor. Declare each relationship on one side only; detail pages derive the reverse direction automatically.

ref.description: Internal reference `<category>/<entry-slug>` (the YAML filename without extension). Preferred whenever the product is in this database; scripts/validate.ts checks that it resolves.

name.description: Display name. Required when the product is not in the database (no `ref`); otherwise an optional label override.

url.description: External link for products not in the database
